issues.title: Loan Simple leads receiving duplicate tasks in pre-referral and post-referral workflows
issues.desc: Loan Simple leads were triggering duplicate tasks across pre-referral and post-referral workflows. The root cause was identified as a bugged filter related to Loan Simple lead associations, which HubSpot support helped resolve. HAs and TCs were seeing duplicate task assignments for the same leads.
issues.workaround: Review any LS leads that received duplicate tasks during the impact window and manually close or ignore the duplicate tasks.

issues.title: Post-referral workflow tasks not stopping when deal marked as Closed Lost or Transferred
issues.desc: HAs continued to receive post-referral workflow check-in tasks even after deals were marked as Closed Lost or Transferred. The workflow filters were not correctly excluding these terminal deal stages. Madelaine made a tweak to the filters on March 9 to resolve the issue.
issues.workaround: Manually dismiss any check-in tasks received for deals already marked as Closed Lost or Transferred during the impact window.

issues.title: Offer Accepted workflow not re-enrolling deals that toggled back and forth from Offer Accepted
issues.desc: When a deal was set to Offer Accepted, then reverted to a prior stage, and then set to Offer Accepted again, the TC workflow tasks did not re-trigger. The root cause was that 'deal stage = offer accepted' was not listed as a re-enrollment criteria in the workflow. Madelaine updated the re-enrollment criteria to fix this.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any deals that toggled back to Offer Accepted during the impact window and did not receive TC tasks.

issues.title: Automated emails showing previous loan officer after LO change on a deal
issues.desc: After a loan officer change on a deal, automated emails continued to reference the previous LO rather than the updated one. The issue was identified on a deal where the LO was changed to Julie Yocum but emails still showed Paul. Luis resolved the issue on March 13.
issues.workaround: Manually resend any automated emails that went out with the incorrect LO information during the impact window.

issues.title: MRC deals marked Offer Accepted not enrolling TCs into workflow tasks
issues.desc: MRC deals updated to Offer Accepted were not triggering TC workflow enrollment or task creation. The issue was investigated with HubSpot support and believed to be resolved after that conversation. TCs were not receiving tasks for MRC deals moving through Offer Accepted, requiring HAs to manually send closing info requests.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any MRC deals updated to Offer Accepted between approximately March 14 and April 1 that did not receive TC tasks, and send closing info requests manually.
